Experience

Jumpseller
Machine Learning Engineer
2018

Built recommendation systems for multiple e-commerce shops, including NLP pipelines on AWS SageMaker and Glue. Worked with Word2Vec word embeddings and TensorFlow for model development. Designed and deployed an online real-time session-based recommendation engine using GRU4REC with a full MLOps setup.

Farfetch
Machine Learning Engineer
2021

Developed recommendation systems in the fashion industry, building ETL pipelines on Azure Databricks. Designed personalised fashion outfit recommendations using an LSTM TensorFlow model. Handled model serving with Gunicorn, Docker, MLFlow and Kubernetes, and batch processing via Spark. Implemented matrix factorisation and dot product similarity for scalable recommendation serving.

Revolut
Data Scientist
2023

Worked in the FinCrime department on card-not-present (CNP) transaction fraud detection. Built gradient boosting models using LightGBM in a binary classification scenario, and performed extensive data analysis and reporting with Pandas.

Tripadvisor
Senior Machine Learning Engineer
2024

Implemented a LangGraph agent for a travel assistant via RAG, using Qdrant as a vector database and HuggingFace transformer models for embeddings. Worked with Redis as a feature store and developed entity matching pipelines to reconcile free-text LLM output with structured data. Conducted LLM-as-judge evaluations to measure assistant quality.

Skills

Python — primary programming language for data engineering, machine learning pipelines, and backend services. Data science libraries (TensorFlow, NumPy, Pandas, scikit-learn) for model development, training, and experimentation. Docker and Kubernetes for containerisation and orchestration of ML model serving infrastructure. LangGraph and LangChain for building agentic LLM-based applications and retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) pipelines. Relational (PostgreSQL, MySQL), NoSQL (MongoDB, DynamoDB), and Vector (Vespa.ai, Qdrant) databases for diverse storage needs.
